testcase.name: test_strict_2d_template_active_for_each_stage[video_generation]

failure.message:
AssertionError: video_generation v5: missing canonical strict-2D phrase. First 200 chars: "STRICT STYLE — preserve the soft pastel 2D children's storybook cartoon style of the input image. The output video clip MUST stay in 2D illustrated / animated style — do NOT morph into photorealism, d" assert 'STRICT STYLE — soft pastel 2D' in "STRICT STYLE — preserve the soft pastel 2D children's storybook cartoon style of the input image. The output video clip MUST stay in 2D illustrated / animated style — do NOT morph into photorealism, do NOT add live-action faces, do NOT change the character identity, outfit, or scene composition. Keep the same cartoon character from the input frame consistent in face, hair, and outfit throughout the clip.

Children's storybook scene $scene_index, $estimated_duration_seconds-second cinematic shot for ages 3-9. Subject: $scene_title. Visual: $visual_description. Camera/motion: $camera_motion_hint. Mood: $emotional_tone. Style: $art_direction, warm pastel tones, soft lighting, child-safe, no text overlay.

Motion: gentle child-safe motion only — slow camera dolly/parallax, subtle character expression changes, ambient micro-motion (sparkles, leaves, fabric drift). Avoid fast cuts, harsh whips, action-movie motion, or realistic physical impact. Per-scene cue: $video_prompt.

FORBIDDEN: photorealism, live-action, semi-real human rendering, 3D-CGI photo realism, realistic skin pores, photographic lighting."

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_phase_n_strict2d_prompts.py:77: in test_strict_2d_template_active_for_each_stage assert "STRICT STYLE — soft pastel 2D" in text, ( E AssertionError: video_generation v5: missing canonical strict-2D phrase. First 200 chars: "STRICT STYLE — preserve the soft pastel 2D children's storybook cartoon style of the input image. The output video clip MUST stay in 2D illustrated / animated style — do NOT morph into photorealism, d" E assert 'STRICT STYLE — soft pastel 2D' in "STRICT STYLE — preserve the soft pastel 2D children's storybook cartoon style of the input image. The output video clip MUST stay in 2D illustrated / animated style — do NOT morph into photorealism, do NOT add live-action faces, do NOT change the character identity, outfit, or scene composition. Keep the same cartoon character from the input frame consistent in face, hair, and outfit throughout the clip.

Children's storybook scene $scene_index, $estimated_duration_seconds-second cinematic shot for ages 3-9. Subject: $scene_title. Visual: $visual_description. Camera/motion: $camera_motion_hint. Mood: $emotional_tone. Style: $art_direction, warm pastel tones, soft lighting, child-safe, no text overlay.

Motion: gentle child-safe motion only — slow camera dolly/parallax, subtle character expression changes, ambient micro-motion (sparkles, leaves, fabric drift). Avoid fast cuts, harsh whips, action-movie motion, or realistic physical impact. Per-scene cue: $video_prompt.

FORBIDDEN: photorealism, live-action, semi-real human rendering, 3D-CGI photo realism, realistic skin pores, photographic lighting."

testcase.name: test_strict_2d_summary_table

failure.message: assert False + where False = all(<generator object test_strict_2d_summary_table.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfbbc3e29d560>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_n_strict2d_prompts.py:106: in test_strict_2d_summary_table assert all(r["has_strict_phrase"] and r["has_forbidden_guard"] for r in summary) E assert False E + where False = all(<generator object test_strict_2d_summary_table.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfbbc3e29d560>)
